message:
fix(session): use hq- prefix for town-level dog and boot sessions

Dog sessions used gt-{townName}-deacon-{dog} which produced gt-gt-deacon-hotel
when the town name is "gt". Boot used gt-boot. Both are town-level services
managed by the deacon, so they should use the hq- prefix like mayor and deacon.

Dogs: gt-gt-deacon-{name} -> hq-dog-{name}
Boot: gt-boot -> hq-boot

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
